de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.AnalyzerProofVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.AnalyzerProofVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofVisitor
    Enclosing class:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder

    private class SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.AnalyzerProofVisitor
extends Object
implements ProofVisitor
    This ProofVisitor is used to transfer the proof tree in KeY into IExecutionNodes which forms the symbolic execution tree.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Map<Node,AbstractExecutionNode<?>> addToMapping
      Maps the Node in KeY's proof tree to the IExecutionNode of the symbolic execution tree where the Nodes children should be added to.
      private SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions completions
      The SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions to update.
      private Map<AbstractExecutionNode<?>,List<ExecutionBranchCondition>> parentToBranchConditionMapping
      This utility Map helps to find a List in SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.branchConditionsStack for the given parent node to that elements in the List should be added.

    • Field Detail

      • completions

        private final SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions completions
        The SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions to update.

      • addToMapping

        private Map<Node,AbstractExecutionNode<?>> addToMapping
        Maps the Node in KeY's proof tree to the IExecutionNode of the symbolic execution tree where the Nodes children should be added to.

      • parentToBranchConditionMapping

        private Map<AbstractExecutionNode<?>,List<ExecutionBranchCondition>> parentToBranchConditionMapping
        This utility Map helps to find a List in SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.branchConditionsStack for the given parent node to that elements in the List should be added.

      • SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.AnalyzerProofVisitor

        public SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.AnalyzerProofVisitor(SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions completions)

    • Method Detail

      • visit

        public void visit(Proof proof,
         Node visitedNode)
        Specified by:
        visit in interface ProofVisitor

      • completeTree

        public void completeTree()

        Completes the execution tree model after all Nodes were visited in visit(Proof, Node). The task of this method is to add ExecutionBranchCondition to the model if they have at least one child.

        Fore more details have a look at the documentation of SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.branchConditionsStack.

      • finishBlockCompletion

        protected void finishBlockCompletion(IExecutionBranchCondition node)
